label: Designation category
description: Defines an Architect menu tab that groups related designators and build options. Each category appears as a tab button in the lower Architect panel.

specialDesignatorClasses.label: Special designator classes
specialDesignatorClasses.description: C# Designator subclass names added to this category at startup. These are type names, not def references.

order.label: Order
order.description: Sort order of this tab in the Architect panel. Lower values appear first.

showPowerGrid.label: Show power grid
showPowerGrid.description: If true, the power grid overlay is drawn while this category tab is selected.

researchPrerequisites.label: Research prerequisites
researchPrerequisites.description: ResearchProjectDef entries that must be completed before this category tab becomes visible.

minMonolithLevel.label: Min monolith level
minMonolithLevel.description: Minimum monolith activation level required before this category tab becomes visible. Used by Anomaly content.

preferredColumn.label: Preferred column
preferredColumn.description: Preferred column index in the Architect panel for designators in this category. Absent means no preference.

basic-category.label: Basic category
basic-category.description: Minimal Architect category with a def name, label, sort order, and designator class list.
